title: How do I show a summary of the subitem status on the item?
excerpt:
How do i automate the status of a subtask to update the progress bar of the item it belongs too? 
in this case if i select DONE on status, and its one of 5 subtasks, i’d like it to represent 20% completed on the items pr…

posts.author: drew.davies (Drew Davies)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do i automate the status of a subtask to update the progress bar of the item it belongs too?
in this case if i select DONE on status, and its one of 5 subtasks, i’d like it to represent 20% completed on the items progress bar

posts.author: JPinBe (John Pescod)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @drew.davies . To get a progress status of subtasks on the parent item you need to click “show summary on parent item” in the property list of the status column of your subtasks. There is no automation necessary for that.

posts.author: emilyw-monday.com (Emily Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @drew.davies,

@JPinBe was right on target! Here is where you can access this and what you will see as a result:

Hopefully this helps!

Emily
